subcodes.title: Words to Kinney, Beede, Thompson party, spoken on 1909-07-02
subcodes.first_line: I hope a great love may be established among you and that day by day this love will increase. I have gathered you all together here
subcodes.subjects: @love of God, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @bringing forth results; fruit, @spiritual transformation
